sentence: La ḥoguera arde tola nueche.
ipa: la hoˈɡeɾa ˈaɾde ˈtola ˈnwetʃe
gloss_en: The bonfire burns all night.
notes: Eastern Latin F->aspiration, written ⟨ḥ⟩ [h] 'ḥoguera' (< focus) — the f->h isogloss of easternmost Asturian, DOCUMENTED not gheada — per morala_egido2009; tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'nueche' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Jizo mucho fríu esti iviernu.
ipa: ˈʝiθo ˈmutʃo ˈfɾiu ˈesti iˈbjeɾnu
gloss_en: It was very cold this winter.
notes: Eastern monophthong and Castilian-adjacent 'mucho' per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'Jizo' and diphthong 'iviernu' [-je-] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La faya crez cerca del ríu.
ipa: la faˈʝa ˈkɾeθ ˈθeɾka del ˈriu
gloss_en: The beech grows near the river.
notes: F- retention 'faya' — contrasts with the ⟨ḥ⟩ [h] aspiration cases in this lect, both attested in the eastern isogloss band — per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩/⟨c⟩ [θ] 'crez','cerca' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Los rapazos cuerren pel monte.
ipa: los raˈpaθos kweˈren pel ˈmonte
gloss_en: The boys run through the woods.
notes: Eastern retains -o (rapazos, monte) rather than raising to -u per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩ [θ], tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'cuerren' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Coyí les llaves na cocina.
ipa: koˈʝi les ˈʎabes na koˈθina
gloss_en: I took the keys in the kitchen.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'llaves' and -LJ->[ʝ] 'Coyí' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cocina' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¿Cuántos años tien to hermano?
ipa: ˈkuantos ˈaɲos ˈtjen ˈto eˈɾmano
gloss_en: How many years does your brother have?
notes: Eastern final -o 'hermano' (no western -u raising) per morala_egido2009; ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'años' and diphthong 'tien' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El gato ñeru duerme cabo del llar.
ipa: el ˈɡato ˈɲeɾu ˈdweɾme ˈkaβo del ˈʎaɾ
gloss_en: The cat sleeps by the hearth.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeru', L->[ʎ] 'llar' per morala_egido2009; eastern -o 'gato' and tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'duerme' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Nun quiero más pan nin queso.
ipa: ˈnun ˈkjeɾo ˈmas ˈpan nin ˈkeso
gloss_en: I don't want more bread or cheese.
notes: Eastern final -o 'queso' (monophthongised, no western ⟨ei⟩) per morala_egido2009; negator 'nun'/'nin' and diphthong 'quiero' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La muyer merca cebollas nel mercao.
ipa: la muˈʝeɾ ˈmeɾka θeˈβoʎas nel ˈmeɾkao
gloss_en: The woman buys onions at the market.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'muyer' and -LL->[ʎ] 'cebollas' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ [θ], eastern -o 'mercao' and 'mercar' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¡Baxa aína y pieslla la puerta!
ipa: ˈbaʃa ˈaina ʝ ˈpjesʎa la ˈpweɾta
gloss_en: Come down quickly and shut the door!
notes: -LL->[ʎ] 'pieslla' and tonic Ĕ>/ie/ 'pieslla', Ŏ>/ue/ 'puerta' per morala_egido2009; ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'Baxa' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Tres vacas pacen la yerba nel prao.
ipa: ˈtɾes ˈbakas paˈθen la ˈʝeɾba nel ˈpɾao
gloss_en: Three cows graze the grass in the meadow.
notes: Eastern monophthong final -o 'prao' (vs western 'prau') per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'pacen' and betacism 'vacas' [b] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Llovía mucho cuando volvimos a casa.
ipa: ʎoˈbia ˈmutʃo ˈkwando boˈlbimos a ˈkasa
gloss_en: It rained a lot when we came home.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'Llovía' per morala_egido2009; betacism 'volvimos' [b] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La ḥariña ta nel saco del molín.
ipa: la haˈɾiɲa ˈta nel ˈsako del moˈlin
gloss_en: The flour is in the sack of the mill.
notes: Eastern F->aspiration ⟨ḥ⟩ [h] 'ḥariña' (< farina) — the f->h isogloss — per morala_egido2009; ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'ḥariña' and eastern -o 'saco' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¿Ónde ta el camino pa la ilesia?
ipa: ˈɔnde ˈta el kaˈmino pa la iˈlesja
gloss_en: Where is the way to the church?
notes: Eastern final -o 'camino' per morala_egido2009; simplified 'ilesia' (< iglesia) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El perru lladra tola nueche.
ipa: el ˈperu ˈʎadɾa ˈtola ˈnwetʃe
gloss_en: The dog barks all night.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'lladra' and tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'nueche' per morala_egido2009; trill [r] 'perru' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La ḥuente cuerre cerca del pueblo.
ipa: la ˈhwente ˈkwere ˈθeɾka del ˈpweblo
gloss_en: The spring runs near the village.
notes: Eastern F->aspiration ⟨ḥ⟩ [h] 'ḥuente' (< fonte, with tonic Ŏ>/ue/) — the f->h isogloss — per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ [θ] 'cerca', trill [r] and eastern -o 'pueblo' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Comimos fabes con chorizo.
ipa: koˈmimos ˈfaβes kon tʃoˈɾiθo
gloss_en: We ate beans with chorizo.
notes: F- retention 'fabes' and eastern -o 'chorizo' per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩ [θ] and ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chorizo' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El ñeñu garra una flor.
ipa: el ˈɲeɲu ˈɡara una ˈfloɾ
gloss_en: The little boy grabs a flower.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeñu' per morala_egido2009; word-initial trill [r] 'garra' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Diez homes trabayan na tierra.
ipa: ˈdjeθ ˈomes tɾaβaˈʝan na ˈtjera
gloss_en: Ten men work the land.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'trabayan' and tonic Ĕ>/ie/ 'Diez','tierra' per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩ [θ] 'Diez' and trill [r] 'tierra' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La lluna rellumba sobre los teyaos.
ipa: la ˈʎuna reˈʎumba ˈsobɾe los teˈʝaos
gloss_en: The moon shines over the rooftops.
notes: Word-initial and -LL->[ʎ] 'lluna','rellumba' per morala_egido2009; -LJ->[ʝ] 'teyaos' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.
